svg.metadata: Pixelspace v0.1 — a 5x7 pixel font with 316 glyphs. Covers GF-latin-core (Latin-1 Supplement, Latin Extended-A, Latin Extended-B, General Punctuation, Currency, Spacing modifiers, and combining diacritics). Designed as an SVG font for import into FontForge, Glyphs, or other editors. Grid: 5 columns x 7 rows. 1 pixel = 125 font units. units-per-em = 875. Baseline at row 5 (0-indexed from top). Advance width = 750 (5 pixels + 1 pixel right bearing).
